name: meetable
tagline: A self-hosted event listing platform with RSVP tracking
description: Meetable is a self-hosted event listing platform that supports IndieWeb standards. It allows managing upcoming and past events, RSVP tracking, and embeds with a responsive interface.

features.title: Event Scheduling
features.description: Propose and schedule events with multiple participants

features.title: Availability Collection
features.description: Collect participant availability for proposed times

features.title: Event Pages
features.description: Share event details using a public link

features.title: No Account Requirement
features.description: Allow participants to respond without registration

features.title: Time Zone Handling
features.description: Display event times in participant time zones

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run the scheduling tool on your own servers
